description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust wooden full stock and a matching wooden fore-end grip. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with the barrel extending forward and capped by a simple front sight. The fore-end grip is ribbed for improved handling and is positioned just below the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is utilitarian, with a blend of wood and metal materials, and the shotgun appears to be of standard length, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a wooden full stock, ribbed fore-end grip, and dark metal barrel and receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, ribbed fore-end grip, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and ribbed fore-end grip from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
